Bold Manifesto / AI consulting for women leaders

STOP OUTSOURCING YOUR FUTURE TO PEOPLE WHO DO NOT HAVE TO LIVE WITH THE CONSEQUENCES.

AI is already reshaping budgets, products, careers, boards, and power. Women leaders do not need permission to understand it. They need a war room.

Start the conversation

The line

Lakecia Gunter has built inside Microsoft, advised near the top of Intel, designed for the Department of Defense, governed as an NYSE public-company director, and hosted the ROAR podcast because silence was never the strategy.

The demand

No more “circle back when the technical team explains it.” No more expensive theater. No more rooms where the most affected leaders have the least language.

The move

We build your AI point of view, your operating plan, and your executive voice—fast enough for the moment and rigorous enough for the board.

25Y

Technology leadership.

$1B+

Platforms at scale.

NYSE

Board governance.

ROAR

Voice and power.

Ready for the next room?

Bring the pressure, the ambition, and the open questions. Lakecia will help you turn them into a leadership position.
